verification_gate: Red tests prove ordered raw teeing for stdout/stderr/binary, invalid UTF-8, partial lines, signals, nonzero exits, parser failure, large-stream chunking, digest and offset integrity, compact-view linkage, and exact profile-owned package resolution.

gate_result.adapter_origin: rtk-tokenkill e822928 'feat(rtk): add byte-exact rtk_nu adapter (#11)' — the blueprint's 2026-07-19 pin 44cf84e7 predates it and correctly recorded rtk_nu as absent then; the adapter landed the next day and the pin advanced
gate_result.signal_fix: genuine red: rtk proxy laundered child signal death into exit 128+sig plus a stderr diagnostic inside the captured stream; fixed by faithful signal re-raise in the proxy arm (rtk-tokenkill 3af59d0, PR FlexNetOS/rtk-tokenkill#13); envelope now records code=null signal=6 with byte-exact frames
gate_result.exact_profile_owned_package_resolution: yazelix flake.nix pins github:FlexNetOS/rtk-tokenkill/0dd13a48b81ac083d8a39351a6a72ca4e7b715c0 (flake.lock agrees); ~/.nix-profile/toolbin/rtk_nu -> /nix/store/18igz92r0gj7dfd7zr09h0p784ylgsn5-rtk-0.43.0/bin/rtk_nu; the yazelix foundation gate asserts the binary and its envelope help text

proof_summary: ARCHBP-040's byte-first rtk_nu adapter is implemented, pinned, and gate-complete. The adapter (rtk-tokenkill e822928, pinned into the profile via yazelix at 0dd13a4 with the binary resolving from the nix store) tees ordered raw stdout/stderr frames with per-frame sha256 digests and contiguous offsets before any transformation, emits versioned JSONL/JSON/Nuon envelopes, declares parser and rtk-filter linkage without coercing native Nu values or invoking the plugin, and preserves invalid UTF-8, partial lines, binary bytes, and nonzero exits. Gate closure (PR FlexNetOS/rtk-tokenkill#13) added the four uncovered cases and surfaced one genuine defect red-first: rtk proxy converted child signal deaths into exit 128+sig and corrupted captured stderr with a diagnostic; the proxy now re-raises the fatal signal so envelopes record the true signal with byte-exact frames. Full suite 2504/0.
